{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Warehouse Manager",
  "description": "Polo - Cico Farms and Estate is a diversified farm complex specializing in large-scale greenhouse production of assorted pepper varieties, alongside poultry and catfish farming for local and international markets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Omoku, Rivers

Job Summary


	The Warehouse Manager is responsible for the efficient management, control, and coordination of all warehouses and stores across Polo-Cico Farms&rsquo; production units.
	This role ensures the proper receipt, storage, issuance, and accountability of raw materials, packaging materials, spare parts, farm inputs, and finished goods. The Warehouse Manager will implement strong inventory controls, maintain accurate records, and support uninterrupted production and distribution operations.


Key Responsibilities
Warehouse &amp; Stores Operations:


	Oversee all central and unit-level warehouses/stores across Polo-Cico Farms.
	Ensure proper receipt, inspection, documentation, storage, and issuance of all materials and finished goods.
	Enforce orderly arrangement of items for easy identification, safety, and stock rotation (FIFO/FEFO).
	Maintain cleanliness, hygiene, and safety standards in all stores, especially for feed, agro-inputs, and food products.


Inventory Management &amp; Control:


	Maintain accurate stock records for all items using stock cards and/or inventory software.
	Conduct regular stock counts (daily spot checks, weekly/monthly cycle counts, and quarterly full stock-takes).
	Investigate and report all stock variances, losses, damages, or expiries.
	Set and monitor minimum and maximum stock levels to prevent stock-outs or overstocking.
	Ensure proper handling of perishable, temperature-sensitive, and high-value items.


Receiving, Issuance &amp; Documentation:


	Verify all deliveries against purchase orders, delivery notes, and invoices.
	Prepare and authorize Goods Received Notes (GRNs).
	Issue materials strictly against approved requisitions.
	Ensure timely and accurate documentation of all stock movements.
	Maintain organized filing of all warehouse records.


Team Leadership &amp; Supervision:


	Supervise storekeepers, warehouse assistants, and loaders.
	Assign duties, prepare duty rosters, and monitor performance.
	Train staff on proper warehousing practices, inventory control, and safety.
	Enforce discipline and compliance with company policies.


Systems, Controls &amp; Reporting:


	Develop and enforce standard operating procedures (SOPs) for all store activities.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly inventory and movement reports.
	Provide stock status reports to management and production units.
	Support internal and external audits.


Health, Safety &amp; Security:


	Ensure compliance with health and safety regulations.
	Implement fire prevention, pest control, and loss-prevention measures.
	Control access to warehouses and safeguard company assets.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Minimum of HND/BSc in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Business Administration, Accounting, or a related field.
	5&ndash;8 years of experience in warehouse or stores management, preferably in an agro-allied, manufacturing, or FMCG environment.
	Proven experience managing multiple warehouses or stores.
	Strong knowledge of inventory control principles and documentation.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;aghoghoac@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-07",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-22",

Warehouse Manager Job at Polo




        
    

        
        Polo - Cico Farms and Estate is a diversified farm complex specializing in large-scale greenhouse production of assorted pepper varieties, alongside poultry and catfish farming for local and international markets.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Manager

Job Location: Omoku, Rivers

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Warehouse Manager is responsible for the efficient management, control, and coordination of all warehouses and stores across Polo-Cico Farms’ production units.
	This role ensures the proper receipt, storage, issuance, and accountability of raw materials, packaging materials, spare parts, farm inputs, and finished goods. The Warehouse Manager will implement strong inventory controls, maintain accurate records, and support uninterrupted production and distribution operations.


Key Responsibilities
Warehouse & Stores Operations:


	Oversee all central and unit-level warehouses/stores across Polo-Cico Farms.
	Ensure proper receipt, inspection, documentation, storage, and issuance of all materials and finished goods.
	Enforce orderly arrangement of items for easy identification, safety, and stock rotation (FIFO/FEFO).
	Maintain cleanliness, hygiene, and safety standards in all stores, especially for feed, agro-inputs, and food products.


Inventory Management & Control:


	Maintain accurate stock records for all items using stock cards and/or inventory software.
	Conduct regular stock counts (daily spot checks, weekly/monthly cycle counts, and quarterly full stock-takes).
	Investigate and report all stock variances, losses, damages, or expiries.
	Set and monitor minimum and maximum stock levels to prevent stock-outs or overstocking.
	Ensure proper handling of perishable, temperature-sensitive, and high-value items.


Receiving, Issuance & Documentation:


	Verify all deliveries against purchase orders, delivery notes, and invoices.
	Prepare and authorize Goods Received Notes (GRNs).
	Issue materials strictly against approved requisitions.
	Ensure timely and accurate documentation of all stock movements.
	Maintain organized filing of all warehouse records.


Team Leadership & Supervision:


	Supervise storekeepers, warehouse assistants, and loaders.
	Assign duties, prepare duty rosters, and monitor performance.
	Train staff on proper warehousing practices, inventory control, and safety.
	Enforce discipline and compliance with company policies.


Systems, Controls & Reporting:


	Develop and enforce standard operating procedures (SOPs) for all store activities.
	Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly inventory and movement reports.
	Provide stock status reports to management and production units.
	Support internal and external audits.


Health, Safety & Security:


	Ensure compliance with health and safety regulations.
	Implement fire prevention, pest control, and loss-prevention measures.
	Control access to warehouses and safeguard company assets.


Qualifications & Experience


	Minimum of HND/BSc in Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Business Administration, Accounting, or a related field.
	5–8 years of experience in warehouse or stores management, preferably in an agro-allied, manufacturing, or FMCG environment.
	Proven experience managing multiple warehouses or stores.
	Strong knowledge of inventory control principles and documentation.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Software Engineer (Data Science Focus)",
  "description": "Aptech Computer Education commenced its education and training business in 1986 and has globally trained over 6.5 million students. Aptech is an ISO 9001:2008 organization and the first IT Training and Education company to get this certification for Education Support Services in 1993. Aptech has presence in more than 40 emerging countries through its two main streams of businesses &ndash; Individual training and Enterprise Business. As a leader in career education, it has over 1300+ centres of learning across the world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Engineer (Data Science Focus)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly skilled and innovative Software Engineer (Data Science &amp; AI Focus) to join our team. The ideal candidate will design intelligent systems, build data-driven applications, and apply Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) techniques to solve complex business problems.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and maintain scalable software applications with a focus on AI-driven solutions
	Build, train, evaluate, and deploy machine learning models
	Develop and optimize data pipelines for large-scale data processing
	Apply AI techniques such as predictive analytics, natural language processing (NLP), and automation
	Analyze large datasets to generate actionable insights and improve decision-making
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams (engineering, product, business)
	Monitor model performance and continuously improve accuracy and efficiency
	Ensure data quality, integrity, and security
	Document models, systems, and workflows


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND, HND, or Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 2-5 years of experience.Strong proficiency in Python (preferred), Java, or JavaScript
	Hands-on experience with AI/ML frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn)
	Experience with data science tools (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib)
	Solid understanding of machine learning algorithms and model lifecycle
	Familiarity with deep learning, NLP, or computer vision is a plus
	Knowledge of SQL/NoSQL databases
	Understanding of MLOps, model deployment, and APIs
	Proficiency with Git and software development best practices


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 monthly

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hassan@raptorstechnologies.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Software Engineer (Data Science &amp; AI Focus)&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Software Engineer (Data Science Focus) Job at Aptech Computer Education




        
    

        
        Aptech Computer Education commenced its education and training business in 1986 and has globally trained over 6.5 million students. Aptech is an ISO 9001:2008 organization and the first IT Training and Education company to get this certification for Education Support Services in 1993. Aptech has presence in more than 40 emerging countries through its two main streams of businesses – Individual training and Enterprise Business. As a leader in career education, it has over 1300+ centres of learning across the world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Engineer (Data Science Focus)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly skilled and innovative Software Engineer (Data Science & AI Focus) to join our team. The ideal candidate will design intelligent systems, build data-driven applications, and apply Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) techniques to solve complex business problems.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and maintain scalable software applications with a focus on AI-driven solutions
	Build, train, evaluate, and deploy machine learning models
	Develop and optimize data pipelines for large-scale data processing
	Apply AI techniques such as predictive analytics, natural language processing (NLP), and automation
	Analyze large datasets to generate actionable insights and improve decision-making
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams (engineering, product, business)
	Monitor model performance and continuously improve accuracy and efficiency
	Ensure data quality, integrity, and security
	Document models, systems, and workflows


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an OND, HND, or Bachelor's Degree with 2-5 years of experience.Strong proficiency in Python (preferred), Java, or JavaScript
	Hands-on experience with AI/ML frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn)
	Experience with data science tools (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib)
	Solid understanding of machine learning algorithms and model lifecycle
	Familiarity with deep learning, NLP, or computer vision is a plus
	Knowledge of SQL/NoSQL databases
	Understanding of MLOps, model deployment, and APIs
	Proficiency with Git and software development best practices


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 monthly

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Software Engineer (Data Science & AI Focus)” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "At Premium HR Solution, our commitment to excellence extends globally, offering unparalleled coverage to meet the diverse talent needs of organizations around the world. With a robust network spanning continents, we leverage our international reach to connect clients with top-tier professionals, ensuring a truly global approach to talent acquisition and management. Our strategic presence enables us to access, assess, and deliver high-calibre candidates across various industries and geographical locations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: FMCG / Beverage

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Procurement Officer to support the sourcing and purchasing of goods and services for our operations.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring cost-effective procurement, maintaining supplier relationships, and supporting uninterrupted production within a fast-paced beverage manufacturing environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Source, evaluate, and negotiate with suppliers to obtain the best value for goods and services.
	Process purchase requisitions and issue purchase orders in a timely manner.
	Monitor inventory levels and coordinate with relevant departments to prevent stock shortages.
	Ensure timely delivery of materials in line with production schedules.
	Maintain and update supplier database and procurement records.
	Conduct market research to identify new suppliers and cost-saving opportunities.
	Track and report on procurement activities, including cost analysis and vendor performance.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and procurement procedures.
	Liaise with finance for invoice processing and payment follow-ups.


Requirements


	B.Sc. / HND in Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	2&ndash;3 years of relevant work experience, preferably in the FMCG or beverage industry.
	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills.
	Good understanding of procurement processes and supply chain principles.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially Excel) and procurement systems.
	Strong analytical and organizational skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


Key Competencies:


	Attention to detail.
	Cost-conscious mindset.
	Problem-solving ability.
	Integrity and accountability.
	Time management and multitasking.


Preferred Advantage:


	Experience working in a manufacturing or beverage company.
	Familiarity with inventory management systems.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-07",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-31",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Procurement Officer Job at Premium HR Solution




        
    

        
        At Premium HR Solution, our commitment to excellence extends globally, offering unparalleled coverage to meet the diverse talent needs of organizations around the world. With a robust network spanning continents, we leverage our international reach to connect clients with top-tier professionals, ensuring a truly global approach to talent acquisition and management. Our strategic presence enables us to access, assess, and deliver high-calibre candidates across various industries and geographical locations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: FMCG / Beverage
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Procurement Officer to support the sourcing and purchasing of goods and services for our operations.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring cost-effective procurement, maintaining supplier relationships, and supporting uninterrupted production within a fast-paced beverage manufacturing environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Source, evaluate, and negotiate with suppliers to obtain the best value for goods and services.
	Process purchase requisitions and issue purchase orders in a timely manner.
	Monitor inventory levels and coordinate with relevant departments to prevent stock shortages.
	Ensure timely delivery of materials in line with production schedules.
	Maintain and update supplier database and procurement records.
	Conduct market research to identify new suppliers and cost-saving opportunities.
	Track and report on procurement activities, including cost analysis and vendor performance.
	Ensure compliance with company policies and procurement procedures.
	Liaise with finance for invoice processing and payment follow-ups.


Requirements


	B.Sc. / HND in Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	2–3 years of relevant work experience, preferably in the FMCG or beverage industry.
	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills.
	Good understanding of procurement processes and supply chain principles.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially Excel) and procurement systems.
	Strong analytical and organizational skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


Key Competencies:


	Attention to detail.
	Cost-conscious mindset.
	Problem-solving ability.
	Integrity and accountability.
	Time management and multitasking.


Preferred Advantage:


	Experience working in a manufacturing or beverage company.
	Familiarity with inventory management systems.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

	The Teller is responsible for providing frontline banking services to customers, including processing deposits, withdrawals, payments, and other financial transactions accurately and efficiently.
	The role requires strong customer service, attention to detail, and adherence to banking policies and compliance standards.


Requirements


	Qualification: NCE / OND
	Age: Not above 27 years.


Benefits


	Compensation: N162,000 monthly.
	HMO, pension, and other benefits.


Note

	Read instructions carefully!!

title: Job Vacancies at Premium Human Resources Solution Limited
content:
Premium Human Resources Solution - Our client, a top firm in Lagos State, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the following positions below:

1.) Front Desk Executive

2.) Customer Care Representative

3.) Call Centre Agent

4.) Receptionist

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Greet and assist visitors in a friendly and professional manner.
	Answer and direct phone calls, emails, and inquiries.
	Manage appointment scheduling and maintain meeting room bookings.
	Handle incoming and outgoing mail or deliveries.
	Maintain reception area cleanliness and orderliness.
	Provide basic administrative support such as filing, photocopying, and data entry.
	Assist with coordinating office activities when required.


Qualification and Experience


	Candidates should possess an HND / B.Sc / B.A. / B.ED Degree with 1 -3 years of proven experience


Requirements:


	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Strong organizational abilities.
	Basic computer knowledge (MS Office, email, etc.).
	Professional appearance and positive attitude.


Remuneration


	Monthly salary: Negotiable
	HMO
	Pension and other benefits.


Note: Read instructions carefully before applying    

    

        Click here to Apply
